task_title: Format two bullet points on the "What I do" slide

steps.step_goal: Select a word in the first finance bullet for text editing
action_preconditions: The presentation is open in LibreOffice Impress on slide 5 titled "What I do:".
The main content text box is visible and no bullet is yet selected for editing.

nl_position: the word "organizations" in the first bullet under "Finance Meetings" near the upper-middle of the slide

steps.action_before_state: Slide 5 is displayed with the content box unselected at the text level, and the right sidebar shows slide properties rather than character formatting controls.
action_after_effects: Text edit mode is activated inside the content box.
The clicked word in the first bullet becomes selected.
steps.nl_explanation: Double-click the word in the first finance bullet to enter text-edit mode and select that word.

steps.step_goal: Expand the selection to the full first finance bullet
action_preconditions: The content box is already in text edit mode.
A single word in the first finance bullet is selected.

nl_position: the already selected word "organizations" in the first bullet under "Finance Meetings"

steps.action_before_state: Only the word "organizations" in the first finance bullet is highlighted, and the right sidebar shows character formatting controls.
action_after_effects: The selection expands from the single word to the entire first bullet sentence.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the already selected word again to expand the selection to the full first bullet line before applying formatting.

steps.step_goal: Apply strikethrough to the first finance bullet
action_preconditions: The full first finance bullet sentence is selected.
The Character controls are visible in the Properties sidebar.

nl_position: the Strikethrough button in the Character section of the right Properties sidebar

steps.action_before_state: The first finance bullet is highlighted as the active text selection, and no strikethrough is yet visible on that line.
action_after_effects: Strikethrough formatting is applied to the selected first bullet.
The first bullet remains selected after the formatting change.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the Strikethrough control to cross out the selected first finance bullet.

steps.step_goal: Select a word in the second finance bullet for text editing
action_preconditions: The content box remains in text edit mode.
The first finance bullet is already struck through.
The second finance bullet is still unformatted.

nl_position: the word "Requests" in the second bullet under "Finance Meetings" near the upper-middle of the slide

steps.action_before_state: The first finance bullet shows strikethrough, while the second finance bullet is plain text and not yet selected.
action_after_effects: The clicked word in the second finance bullet becomes selected.
steps.nl_explanation: Double-click the word in the second finance bullet to select it for formatting.

steps.step_goal: Expand the selection to the full second finance bullet
action_preconditions: A single word in the second finance bullet is selected.
The slide is still in text edit mode.

nl_position: the already selected word "Requests" in the second bullet under "Finance Meetings"

steps.action_before_state: Only the word "Requests" in the second finance bullet is highlighted.
action_after_effects: The selection expands to the entire second bullet sentence.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the selected word again to expand the selection to the full second bullet line.

steps.step_goal: Apply underline formatting to the second finance bullet
action_preconditions: The entire second finance bullet sentence is selected.
The Character controls are visible in the Properties sidebar.

nl_position: the Underline button in the Character section of the right Properties sidebar

steps.action_before_state: The second finance bullet is highlighted as the active selection, and it is not yet underlined.
action_after_effects: Underline formatting is applied to the selected second bullet.
The second bullet remains selected after the formatting change.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the Underline control to underline the selected second finance bullet.

steps.step_goal: Save the presentation after the formatting edits
action_preconditions: The presentation has unsaved formatting changes on slide 5.
The first finance bullet is struck through and the second finance bullet is underlined.
steps.action_before_state: The edited slide remains open in text edit mode with the formatting changes visible.
action_after_effects: The presentation is saved with the new formatting.
No obvious visual change appears in the slide workspace after the save.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+S to save the presentation after applying the text formatting changes.
